message:
test(pty): expand from 3 to 39 tests for PTY system (wa-3hpuc)

Add 36 new tests: PtySize (Default, Clone/Eq, Debug, inequality),
ExitStatus (with_exit_code success/failure, with_signal, Display for
all three variants, Clone, Debug), CommandBuilder (new/from_argv/
default_prog construction, arg/args append and panic on default,
replace_default_prog and panic on non-default, controlling_tty
get/set, cwd set/get/clear, get_argv_mut, as_unix_command_line
simple/args/quoting, Clone/PartialEq/Debug, iter_full_env_as_str,
EnvEntry::map_key identity, get_shell returns absolute path).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
